allow: Bash(psql "$SUPA" -c "select ''brands'' t, count\(*\) from public.brands union all select ''products'', count\(*\) from public.products union all select ''pallet_deals'', count\(*\) from public.pallet_deals union all select ''pallet_deal_items'', count\(*\) from public.pallet_deal_items union all select ''order_cutoffs'', count\(*\) from public.order_cutoffs union all select ''product_cutoff_overrides'', count\(*\) from public.product_cutoff_overrides order by 1;")
Bash(psql "$SUPA" -c "select count\(*\) filter \(where customer_id is not null\) as customer_scoped, count\(*\) filter \(where customer_id is null\) as global_products from public.products;")
